title: APM: Octo Demo Attack Path Link
description: Link analysis for the Octo attack-lab path. Groups attack stages, traces, and spans into a single investigation canvas with custom tiles for the number of attacks, events, traces, and stages.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and 'Attack ID' != null and 'Trace ID' != null | link span = 5minute 'Attack ID', 'Attack Stage', 'Trace ID', 'Span ID' | eventstats distinctcount('Attack ID') as Attacks, sum(Count) as Events, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Traces, distinctcount('Attack Stage') as Stages
falsepositives: Expected attack-lab runs from the admin console during a workshop or demo.

visualizationOptions.tileLayoutXml: <title-text>Attack IDs</title-text><title-text>Events</title-text><title-text>Traces</title-text><title-text>Stages</title-text>

ask_ai_prompts: Walk the attack path from edge control to exfiltration and identify the span where payment data was intercepted.
Which attack stage should the analyst pivot into first, and which Trace ID links it to APM?
